name: EDOT Assistant - Stale Knowledge Base Documents

esqlQuery.esql: FROM edot-kb-docs | WHERE freshness_score < 0.3 | STATS stale_count = COUNT(*)

params.message: EDOT Assistant Alert: {{context.value}} documents in edot-kb-docs are stale (freshness_score < 0.3). Refresh with 'bash scripts/run_crawler.sh' and/or 'python -m ingest.run_ingestion --all --force'.
params.subject: EDOT Assistant - Stale Documents Detected
